model_description: Weight-average (Model Soup) of 3 cosine-2-epoch CE checkpoints (CE-1 warmup=0.33 seed=42, CE-2 warmup=0.1 seed=42, CE-3 warmup=0.33 seed=43). Single forward pass at serve time.

temperature_fit.note: T < 1 sharpens; model is under-confident due to focal_gamma=2 push toward uniform

operating_point.rationale: just past the PR-curve knee; precision drops sharply above this recall

caveats: Threshold is calibrated on the labeled test split (~50.6% Exact base rate). Production rerank candidates come from hybrid_classified retrieval, which has a different (likely lower) Exact rate. Re-fit on a sample of real top-N retrieval candidates before locking the operating point.
Threshold is paired to this specific model + temperature. If the CE backbone, the Soup composition, or T is changed, redo the PR sweep.
Apply temperature first, then threshold: probs = softmax(logits / 0.534); is_relevant = probs[Exact] > 0.347.
Recall and precision here are over the binary collapse Exact-vs-rest. Substitute and Complement count as negatives, per project convention (DEFAULT_BINARY_RELEVANT_LABELS = ('Exact',)).
